name: Sensory Friendly Kids' Bean Bag - Pillowfort™
description: Whether they're reading a book, watching a movie or just hanging out, this Sensory Friendly Bean Bag from Pillowfort™ gives your kiddo a delightfully comfy spot they'll love to call their own. A soft velvet cover gives this kids bean bag a cozy feel that's perfect for snuggling up in, and its machine-washable cover lends easy upkeep alongside the water-resistant liner to help keep it in great condition longer. The sensory bean bag features a wide seat that provides enhanced comfort, complete with a snuggly, filled design lending the perfect amount of cushioned comfort. There's even a top handle that makes it a breeze to move from room to room so they always have a comfy spot to chill.
